case_title: BEN JIANG YAO VS. ELENA LAUCHUNGNACARINO

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL **GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF BEN JIANG YAO IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CHINESE COURT INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU AND REPRESENTED BY PETER YAO (SON AND PROPERTY MANAGER). DEFENDANT ELENA LAUCHUNGNACARINO ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH COURT INTERPRETER ELLEN ROSENTHAL. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAO, BEN JIANG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUCHUNGNACARINO, ELENA $2,405.63 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,480.63, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-24-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUCHUNGNACARINO, ELENA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-01-2021 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOV-18-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT IS UNABLE TO PROVIDE A CANTONESE INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF IS CALLED AND NOTIFIED THAT AN INTERPERTER IS NOT AVAILABLE TO ASSIST HIM TODAY AND AGREES TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE TO NOV-18-2021 AT 1:30 P.M. DEFENDANT IS CALLED AND A VOICE MAIL MESSAGE IS LEFT INFORMING HER OF THE TRIAL DATE CONTINUANCE AND HER APPEARANCE FOR TODAY IS NOT REQUIRED. NOTICE OF NEW TRIAL DATE IS MAILED TO ALL PARTIES. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2022 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUCHUNGNACARINO, ELENA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR CANTONESE INTERPERTER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-18-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUCHUNGNACARINO, ELENA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
